advancements.story.place_dissolver.title: Deconstruct Reconstruct
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.di: Learn dirt. The economy may never recover.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.wo: Learn wood and discover that logs do, in fact, have fiscal value.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.di: Learn diamonds. Please remain humble in front of the cobblestone.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ex: Learn an item from outside Minecraft's namespace.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.co: Learn cobblestone. Somehow, this is still an investment.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.st: Learn a stick. Wall Street is watching.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ro: Learn rotten flesh. It has value, but at what cost?
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.eg: Learn an egg. The future is mostly omelet-shaped.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.em: Learn emeralds. The villagers would like a word.
